test_report.title: Sandbox/Workspace Clone UI Testing - MyMergent

1_login_and_dashboard_load.description: Login with credentials and verify dashboard loads
details: Login page loaded correctly with MyMergent branding
Authentication with testprov@test.com/password123 successful
Dashboard loaded with data-testid='dashboard' visible
All required UI elements present (project selector, chat area, etc.)

2_project_selector_shows_projects.description: Click project-selector to open dropdown and verify projects are listed
details: Project selector (data-testid='project-selector') clicked successfully
Project dropdown opened showing 21 total projects
Projects list populated correctly in dropdown
Create Sandbox option (data-testid='create-sandbox-btn') visible and accessible
Create Sandbox button (data-testid='create-sandbox-btn') clicked successfully
Sandbox creation completed within expected timeframe
Toast notification appeared: 'debug-inspect [sandbox] is ready. Changes stay isolated.'
Project selector updated to show sandbox project with [sandbox] suffix
Sandbox badge (data-testid='sandbox-badge') appeared with amber styling
Sandbox banner (data-testid='sandbox-banner') visible with text: 'Sandbox Mode — Changes stay isolated from the primary workspace'

4_sandbox_listed_in_dropdown.description: Verify sandbox appears in project dropdown with proper indicators
details: Sandbox project appears in dropdown with amber flask icon
Sandbox project has 'sandbox' badge visible
Sandbox project name shows '[sandbox]' suffix
Visual distinction from regular projects maintained
Can identify sandbox projects easily in the list

5_ui_indicators_working.description: Verify all sandbox UI indicators are functioning
details: Sandbox banner (data-testid='sandbox-banner') displays correct text
Sandbox badge (data-testid='sandbox-badge') shows 'sandbox' label with amber styling
Project title in header shows '[sandbox]' suffix
Amber color scheme used consistently for sandbox elements
Flask icon used to identify sandbox projects

key_screenshots: /app/test_reports/iteration_15_project_dropdown.png - Project dropdown with Create Sandbox option
/app/test_reports/iteration_15_sandbox_created.png - Sandbox created with banner and badge

test_data_points.sandbox_banner_text: Sandbox Mode — Changes stay isolated from the primary workspace
test_data_points.toast_notification: debug-inspect [sandbox] is ready. Changes stay isolated.

functionality_confirmed: Project list updates with sandbox entries
UI state management during sandbox operations
notes: App loads slowly as expected - used generous timeouts (15s initial, 10s login)
All specified test scenarios from review request completed successfully
Sandbox functionality is fully operational and user-friendly
Visual design is consistent with amber color scheme for sandbox elements
No cleanup needed as mentioned in requirements
test_report.test_completion: All 5 test scenarios passed. Sandbox/Workspace Clone UI is working correctly.
